CVE-2004-2779.title: id3_utf16_deserialize() in utf16.c in libid3tag through 0.15.1b m ...
CVE-2004-2779.description: id3_utf16_deserialize() in utf16.c in libid3tag through 0.15.1b misparses ID3v2 tags encoded in UTF-16 with an odd number of bytes, triggering an endless loop allocating memory until an OOM condition is reached, leading to denial-of-service (DoS).

CVE-2017-11550.title: The id3_ucs4_length function in ucs4.c in libid3tag 0.15.1b allow ...
CVE-2017-11550.description: The id3_ucs4_length function in ucs4.c in libid3tag 0.15.1b allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (NULL Pointer Dereference and application crash) via a crafted mp3 file.
